personal.preferred_title: Principal Data Engineer | Enterprise Data Platforms & Financial Services

summary: Principal-level Data Engineer with 20+ years of enterprise technology experience spanning data engineering, data warehousing, SQL optimization, production support, release governance, and financial-services reporting. Strong background building and operating Python/SQL ETL pipelines, enterprise reporting datasets, data quality controls, and production analytics platforms in regulated banking environments. Experienced partnering with architects, product owners, BI teams, and offshore/onshore engineering groups to modernize legacy data processes, improve reliability, and deliver governed data for enterprise decision-making.

experience.title: Senior Capacity & Data Engineer
bullets: Led design and operation of enterprise data pipelines ingesting P95 telemetry from 6,000+ endpoints, replacing manual reporting workflows with automated Python/Pandas ETL and governed historical data stores.

Designed optimized Oracle schemas and reporting structures for historical retention, executive analytics, forecasting, reconciliation, and production capacity decision support in a regulated financial-services environment.
Built a hybrid AWS/Oracle data platform using S3 landing zones, AWS Glue ETL, and Amazon Redshift for large-scale forecasting workloads, applying warehouse-style modeling and operational controls.
Embedded data quality, validation, reconciliation, and monitoring practices into production data workflows supporting capacity planning, operational reporting, and stakeholder analytics.
Owned production support, incident investigation, release coordination, and operational improvement for data-driven reporting systems used by infrastructure and application leadership.
Partnered with technology leaders, architects, engineering teams, and business stakeholders to translate operational and regulatory needs into reliable data solutions and actionable reporting.

experience.title: Performance Engineer
bullets: Managed Dynatrace AppMon/Synthetics monitoring for Brand.com and critical hospitality systems, delivering reliable telemetry, dashboards, and performance reporting for engineering stakeholders.
Led the FAST project by mining real-user and synthetic performance data to identify optimization opportunities adopted by application teams.
Upgraded Dynatrace from 6.5 to 7.0 and enforced TLS 1.2 security with zero regression in production monitoring coverage during cutover.
Integrated HP Performance Center with Dynatrace to correlate load-test results with application traces, infrastructure behavior, and performance bottlenecks.

experience.title: SME for CA APM (Senior Consultant)
bullets: Served as CA APM SME for a large financial-services client, managing 50+ Enterprise Managers and 4,000-6,000 instrumented agents across production-critical systems.
Led large-scale CA APM upgrades from 9.1 to 10.1 with zero unplanned downtime while coordinating architecture, infrastructure, operations, and application teams.
Designed reusable dashboards, alert thresholds, management modules, and SLA reporting standards adopted across client environments.
Built Perl/Korn shell extraction and reporting automation that reduced manual weekly export work and improved operational visibility.
Mentored client engineers, documented standards, and supported design reviews for monitoring, instrumentation, sizing, and operational readiness.

experience.title: Senior Systems & Data Migration Engineer
bullets: Led migration of a high-throughput shopping engine from 200+ MySQL nodes to a 6-node Oracle RAC cluster while preserving correctness, throughput, and sub-second query behavior.
Optimized core transaction processing using C++ and OCCI, reducing physical hardware footprint by 95% while maintaining high-volume transaction performance.
Built C++/OCCI/OCI testing and validation framework to reconcile migration results across millions of records and support phased cutover confidence.
Automated schema conversion and data validation workflows, strengthening data integrity and operational readiness throughout the migration.

education.degree: High Diploma / Post-Graduate Diploma in Computer Engineering Technology / Computer Science
Bachelor of Science in Civil Engineering

projects.name: HorizonScale — AI Capacity Forecasting Engine
projects.description: Built an enterprise forecasting and analytics platform using Python, PySpark, Prophet, scikit-learn, and Streamlit to transform telemetry into capacity insights, reduce manual forecasting cycles, and surface operational risk for senior stakeholders.

projects.name: Serverless Lakehouse Platform (AWS)
projects.description: Designed a serverless data platform using S3, Glue, Athena, Redshift, Parquet, and PySpark patterns for raw ingestion, transformation, optimized query access, and AI-assisted data interaction.

projects.name: AI-Powered Job Search Pipeline
projects.description: Built a local automation pipeline with semantic duplicate detection, LLM-assisted scoring, JSON artifact generation, quality gates, and application tracking using Python and agentic workflow patterns.
